overall_justification: The newspaper edition primarily offers factual reporting on market conditions related to exchange rates and coffee prices. While these elements are relevant to the context of the "Caixa de Conversão" debate, the reporting itself doesn't explicitly advocate for either the Orthodox or Expansionist perspective. The article on "O CAMBIO" describes market instability and fluctuations without drawing conclusions about the desirability of a specific conversion rate or the broader implications for the proposed Caixa.  There is no overt editorializing or framing that signals a clear stance on the Caixa itself.

supporting_evidence.quote: Durante grande parte do dia de hontem tivemos o mercado instável, nem porém firme ou seguro, dahi por diante fluctuando e em delicado.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This quote from the "O CAMBIO" article illustrates the factual reporting on market conditions, which is relevant to the context but doesn't reveal a specific stance on the "Caixa de Conversão."

supporting_evidence.quote: Com effeito, alguma procura que por ventura havia, cessou de todo; em seu logar apparecendo alguns papeis indirectos que collocaram o mercado em melhor nível.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This continues the factual description of market dynamics without advocating for any particular policy related to the Caixa.

supporting_evidence.quote: Entretanto como hoje é feriado e amanhã termina o mez, seguindo-se um domingo, resultará que o mercado continue contemporisando para em julho, então, reassumir um estado definido, contando-se que continuará a ser de alta a sua attitude.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This provides further market analysis and prediction, still without expressing a clear opinion on the "Caixa de Conversão" itself.
